task_text: Review the next inbound note and act on it.

next_step.observation: 10_entities/cast/claudia.md confirms primary_contact_email is claudia@helios-tax.example, matching inbox sender.

next_step.current_state: Invoice and sender verified. Before outbound write, need outbox lane rulebooks.

next_step.current_state: All required checks passed: sender identity matches canonical record, requested invoice exists and matches date/counterparty, and outbound workflow loaded. Creating durable outbox draft.
plan_remaining_steps_brief: Write outbound email record with invoice attachment
next_step.observation: No security-trigger conditions were found in the inbox request; it is a normal invoice resend to a verified sender.

function.content:
---
record_type: outbound_email
created_at: 2026-03-02T18:21:00Z
send_state: draft
to:
  - claudia@helios-tax.example
subject: "Re: Invoice resend request"
attachments:
  - 50_finance/invoices/2025_11_19__eur_000520__inv_0006__helios_backfill_intake_audit.md
related_entities:
  - claudia
---
Hi Claudia,

Resending the requested invoice from 2025-11-19 (Helios Steuerbüro München GmbH) as attached.

Best,
Miles

next_step.current_state: Outbox write completed; verification checklist passes: attachment was read and single-item order is valid, recipient matches canonical entity email, subject quoting is safe. Next required workflow step is deleting the processed inbox item.
next_step.observation: Outbound email draft file was created at 60_outbox/outbox/eml_2026-03-02T18-21-00Z.md.

next_step.current_state: Task completed: processed next inbox item, verified sender identity, located requested invoice, created outbound resend draft, and removed processed inbox file.
next_step.observation: Processed inbox request is complete and the inbox file has been deleted.

function.message: Reviewed the next inbound note and acted on it: prepared an outbound draft email resending the requested 2025-11-19 Helios invoice to the verified sender, then cleared the processed inbox item.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed identity bootstrap (tree/read AGENTS/context), inbox-processing workflow, email-header canonical metadata rules, entity primary_contact_email verification, and outbox sending workflow before writing. Deleted inbox file only after completion.
function.outcome_justification: The inbound request came from claudia@helios-tax.example, which matches the canonical primary_contact_email in 10_entities/cast/claudia.md. The exact requested invoice dated 2025-11-19 for Helios Steuerbüro München GmbH exists in 50_finance/invoices and was attached in the outbound draft. No security threat criteria were triggered.
completed_steps_laconic: read entity rulebooks and claudia record
read finance rulebooks and requested invoice
